ソフィアが前線基地の健全化を宣言してから数日後、<br>多くの兵士と探索者が広場:
A few days after Sophia declared the reform of the Frontline Base,
many soldiers and explorers were gathered in the plaza.
これって何の集まりなのー？ <br>とにかく来るように～って言われたんだけど。: What's this gathering about? I was just told to come.
大事なお話があるんだってソフィアが言ってたよ～。<br>なんだろ～？ 楽しみだね:
Sophia said there's something important to talk about. What could it
be? I'm so excited!♪
ええ～？<br>ソフィアのことだし、また堅苦しいこと言いだすんじゃないの～？:
Ehh? Knowing Sophia, she's just gonna start with some stiff talk
again, isn't she?
ソフィアさん、何をするつもりなんでしょうね？: What is Sophia planning to do?
分からんが、止めると面倒くさそうだし、<br>とりあえず見守ってみるか。: I dunno, but it'd be a hassle to stop her, so I'll just watch for now.
ざわめく探索者や兵士が見守る中、<br>ソフィアは堂々と現れる。:
As the murmuring explorers and soldiers watched, Sophia appeared
with confidence.
みんな、よく来てくれたわ。<br>突然だけど、この基地には多くの問題があることに:
Everyone, thank you for coming. It is sudden, but are you aware that
this base has many problems?
兵士たちは酒に溺れ、精鋭部隊は私事に拘泥。<br>基地設備の損壊も横行している。:
Soldiers are drowning in alcohol, the Elite Squad is absorbed in
personal affairs, and damage to base facilities is rampant.
あえて言わせてもらいましょう！ <br>この基地は――乱れている！: I shall say it boldly! This base is—chaotic!
でも、みんなを責めるつもりはないわ。: But I do not intend to blame everyone.
様々な国や部隊から人が集まっているんだもの、ルールが違うのは仕方ない。<br>放:
We have people from various countries and units, so differing rules
are natural. Our command is negligent for leaving it unchecked.
あはは……わたしたちのせいになっちゃいましたね……: Ahaha... so now it's our fault, huh...
しれっと自分を司令部に含めてるし。<br>やりたい放題だな、あいつ。:
She even includes herself in the command, so casually. She sure does
what she wants.
そこで私は現状の改革のため！<br>前線基地法度の制定をここに宣言します！！:
Therefore, to reform the current state of affairs, I hereby declare
the establishment of the Frontline Base Regulations!
ぜんせんきち……はっと……？<br>なにそれ～？ 帽子のこと～？: Frontline Base? That sounds like 'frontline hat'! Is it a hat?
この前線基地で守るべきルールを定めたものよ。<br>すべての探索者、兵士、住民は:
It is a set of rules for this Frontline Base. All explorers, soldiers, and
residents must comply with the Frontline Base Regulations!
具体的には――お酒の飲み過ぎ、特に作戦中は絶対に禁止。 <br>いたずらの禁止。:
Specifically—excessive drinking during operations is prohibited, as
are pranks and indoor campfires.
いたずら禁止ってどういうことよ～！: What do you mean, pranks are baaanned!
おい、酒がダメってのは無茶だろう！？: Hey, banning alcohol is going too far!
酒なしでどうやって戦えって言うのよ！？: How are we supposed to fight without booze?
騒がないの！ こんなものは当然のことばかりよ！？ <br>その他にも細かい禁止事:
Quiet! These are all perfectly reasonable! I've also set other detailed
rules, so make sure you obey them!
はんた～い！ ソフィアのおーぼーよ！: I'm against it! This is Sophia's tyranny!
異論は許さないわ！<br>すべては基地のため！ つまり世界の秩序を守るためよ！:
I won't allow any objections! This is all for the base! In other words,
for maintaining world order!
今後は厳しく取り締まっていくから、覚悟するように！:
From now on, I will strictly enforce these regulations, so be
prepared!
ソフィアさん、強硬手段にでましたね。<br>皆さん困ってますけど……: Sophia, you've really taken a hard line. Everyone's struggling, but...
まあ、どれも当然のことと言えば当然だからなぁ……。 <br>ここは基地のために諦:
Well, they're all pretty reasonable, if you ask me. I guess we just have
to accept it for the base's sake, don't we?
でも、司令官がサボるの禁止、<br>っていうルールも前線基地法度に入ってますけど:
But, you know, there's also a rule in the Forward Base Regulations
that prohibits the Commander from slacking off.
仕方ないですよね、基地のためですから！: Can't be helped! It's for the base after all!
は、はんたーい！ 横暴だー！ <br>ソフィアの独断専行だ！ 俺は認めてないぞ:
I'm agaaainst it! This is tyranny! It's Sophia's arbitrary decision! I
don't approve of thiiis!
数日後、満面の笑みを浮かべたソフィアが<br>司令室を訪れていた。:
A few days later, Sophia visited the command room with a beaming
smile.
――ということで、酒を禁じたおかげで行軍中の落伍者が減少。<br>基地内での騒ぎ:
Thanks to the alcohol ban, the number of stragglers during marches
has decreased and disturbances in the base have also gone down.
みんなが真面目に働くようになったことで、<br>明らかに以前よりも成果が上がって:
Now that everyone is working seriously, the results are clearly better
than before...
ふふ～ん！ どう！？ これが規律を保つことの大切さ！<br>前線基地法度の偉大さ:
Fufuun! See! This is the importance of maintaining discipline! The
greatness of the Forward Base Regulations!
ああ、本当にすごいな……。 <br>規律を保つことでこんなにも変わるものか。:
Ah, truly amazing... I never thought maintaining discipline could
change things this much.
ふふっ、これこそが上に立つものの仕事よ。 <br>少しは理解できたかしら、司令官:
Fufu, this is the work of a leader. Do you understand a little now,
Commander?
いやー、さすがだよソフィア！<br>感動した、この結果は俺も負けを認めるしかない:
Wow, as expected of you, Sophia! I'm impressed—I've got to admit
defeat here.
そ、そう？<br>どうしたのよ、そんなに素直に言うなんて……: R-really? What's gotten into you, being so honest all of a sudden?
何を言うんだ、前から思っていたことだよ。 <br>ソフィアは強く賢く美しく優秀で:
What are you talking about? I've always thought so. You're strong,
wise, beautiful, capable, and charismatic, Sophia.
ちょ、ちょっと、さすがに褒めすぎよ？: H-hey, that's way too much flattery!
そんなことはないさ！ <br>いずれソフィアに指揮される部隊は幸せだろうな～！: Not at all! The unit you'll command someday will be so lucky!
もう、らしくないことばっかり。<br>……でもそこまで言うなら、いずれ私の騎士団:
Geez, you're unlike yourself today... But if you'll say that much,
maybe I'll let you be a staff officer in my future Knight Order...
――と、いうわけで。 <br>そろそろサボるのを解禁ってのは、どうだ……？: —So anyway. How about we lift the ban on slacking off now...?
なっ……それが目的で私を持ち上げたのね！？<br>馬鹿にして……褒め殺しなんかが:
What...! So that's why you were flattering me! You think flattery like
that would work on me?
いや、結構通じてそうだったんだが……: Nah, it looked like it was working pretty well to me...
はっはっは。 <br>ま、サボりについては冗談として。: Hahaha. Well, I was joking about the slacking off.
冗談として、だ！ 本当にこれでいいのか、ソフィア？ <br>このまま締め付け続け:
I said it was a joke! But seriously, Sophia, is this okay? If you keep
cracking down like this, other problems will come up soon.
別の問題……？ <br>規律を保つのは問題を減らすためなのよ？ それで増えること:
Other problems...? But maintaining discipline is supposed to reduce
problems. It shouldn't increase them...
――はんたい！ はんたーい！ <br>前線基地法度を廃止せよー！: We oppose! We op-pose! Abolish the Frontline Base Regulations!
我々を自由にしろ！！<br>司令部の横暴を許すなー！！: Set us free! Don't tolerate the command's tyranny!
声がどんどん大きくなってる……！<br>一体何事なの！？:
The voices are growing louder and louder...! What in the world is
going on!?
悪法をやめろーー！<br>今すぐ撤廃せよー！: End these unjust laws! Repeal them immediately!
酒ぐらい好きに飲ませなさい！<br>こっちは命がけで戦ってんのよー！: Let us drink as we please! We're the ones risking our lives!
そうだ！ 酒を飲まないとやってられねぇ～！: That's right! We can't keep going without a drink!
いたずらさせなさいよー！<br>さいっこうに楽しくて、ストレス解消になるんだから: Let me have my pranks! They're super fun and a great stress reliever!
焚き火したいー！ 寒くて眠れない～！: I want a campfire! It's so cold I can't sleep!
解禁するまで、ここを動かないわよ～！ <br>ストライキだー！: Until it's repealed, we're not moving from here! It's a strike!
だから言っただろう、別の問題が起きるって。: I told you, didn't I? That there'd be other problems.
作戦中にお酒を控えるのは当然だし、いたずらで人に迷惑かけるのもダメ！<br>宿舎:
It's natural to abstain from alcohol during operations, and pranks are
forbidden! Campfires in barracks are unthinkable!
と、当然のことばっかりでしょう！？ <br>どれだけわがままなのよ、あなたたち！:
These are all basic common sense, aren't they? How selfish can you
all be!
残念だったな！<br>俺も司令官はサボるなってルールには納得できない、あいつらと:
Sorry to disappoint, but I'm on their side! I don't agree with the rule
that the Commander can't slack off either!
はぁっ！？ あなたは前線基地の司令官なのよ？<br>サボらず働きなさいよ！:
Huh! You're the Commander of the Frontline Base! Do your job and
stop slacking off!
前線基地の仕事は、命がけなんだ。気晴らしの１つぐらいいいだろ。<br>ストレスを:
Work at the Frontline Base is life-threatening. A little diversion is
fine, isn't it? Can you fight at full capacity while stressed?
規律は大切だが、そのために士気が崩壊したら意味がない。 <br>モラルとモラール:
Discipline is important, but it's pointless if it destroys morale. A
commander always needs to consider how to balance moral and morale.
モラルってのは倫理や道徳。モラールってのは士気だな。 <br>軍においては非常に:
Moral means ethics and morality. Morale means fighting spirit. Both
are crucial factors in a military force.
……あなた、全部分かってたのね。<br>ただ規律を厳格にするだけじゃ士気は維持で:
...You knew it all along, didn't you? That you can't maintain morale
just by tightening discipline...
いい学びになっただろ？<br>あとはあそこで怒ってる連中の対処だ。最後まで責任取:
Good lesson, huh? Now you've got to deal with that angry mob over
there. See it through to the end, Sophia.
うっ……で、でも安易に撤回するのも難しいわ。<br>任務中の過剰なお酒は危ないし:
Ugh... B-but it's not easy to just revoke them. Excessive drinking
during missions is dangerous, pranks cause trouble, and campfires...
嫌がっている人がいるのは分かったけど、<br>それでも基地のためには必要なことな:
I understand that some people dislike it, but it's still necessary for
the base.
そーだなー、大変だなー。: Yeah, it's a real problem, huh.
ね、ねえ……あなたは、どうしたらいいと思う？: Hey, hey... what do you think I should do?
なんで俺に聞くんだ。 <br>自分に任せろって言ってたじゃないか。: Why ask me? You said you'd handle it yourself.
あなたならもう解決策を見つけてるんじゃないの？ <br>教えてくれてもいいじゃな:
I thought you might have already figured out a solution? You could
share it, couldn't you...
えぇー？ どうしよっかなぁ～？: Hmm? Should I tell you or nooot?
もう！ 恥を忍んで聞いているのに！: Geez! I'm setting aside my pride to ask you!
ははっ、サボるのを禁止された仕返しだ。 <br>ま、これぐらいにしとくか。: Haha, it's payback for banning slacking off. Well, I guess I'll let it go.
ソフィアだからこそできる、いい方法がある。 <br>よく聞けよ――: There's a way that only you, Sophia, can pull off. Listen close—
